headline: The Boeing Company (BA) is Awarded a $166.84M Navy Contract for P-8A Systems Engineering and Modernization Work
summary: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is among the 15 Best Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 10 Years. On February 27, 2026, The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) was awarded a $166.84M cost-plus-fixed-fee, indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity contract to provide engineering analysis, software maintenance, support services, and modernization work for P-8A systems supporting Navy sustainment tasks tied to obsolescence […]

headline: Boeing Order Rebound And Vietnam Deals Revive Commercial Recovery Story
summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) surpassed Airbus in plane orders for the first time in seven years. The company secured multi billion dollar jet sales to Vietnamese airlines. These developments point to a recovery in Boeing's commercial aircraft business. For anyone tracking commercial aviation, Boeing sits at the center of global aircraft production and long term fleet planning. After years of operational and regulatory challenges, fresh order momentum and new approvals are drawing attention back to the...
